---
title: "Glossary"
---

| Term | Meaning |
|---|---|
| scRNA-seq | Single-cell RNA sequencing |
| UMI | Unique molecular identifier; tags original RNA molecules |
| Cell barcode | Sequence label used to identify which cell a read came from |
| Count matrix | Gene-by-cell matrix of expression counts |
| Dropout | A zero count caused by non-detection rather than true absence |
| QC | Quality control; removal of low-quality cells or artifacts |
| HVG | Highly variable gene |
| PCA | Principal component analysis |
| UMAP | 2D visualization method commonly used in single-cell analysis |
| Cluster | Group of transcriptionally similar cells |
| Marker gene | Gene enriched in a cluster or cell type |
| Batch effect | Technical variation caused by experiment/run differences |
| Doublet | Two cells captured as one apparent cell |
| Ambient RNA | Free RNA in droplets that can contaminate expression profiles |
